basic_details.job_title: CUJ Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Sports Instructor, Groundsman and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Central University of Jharkhand (CUJ) has officially announced the Consultant Sports Instructor/Coach and Consultant Groundsman Recruitment 2026 with 7 vacancies on a contractual basis. The detailed notification was released under Advertisement No. CUJ/Advt./2026-27/02. Candidates aged up to 40 years for Instructor/Coach posts and up to 35 years for Groundsman posts, possessing 10th, Diploma, BPED/MPED, or NSNIS Certificate qualifications, are eligible to apply. Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of up to Rs. 30,000. Interested candidates can submit their online applications

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Consultant Sports Instructor/Coach: Maximum 40 years Consultant Groundsman: Maximum 35 years

qualification.details: Consultant Sports Instructor/Coach: NSNIS Certificate/ Diploma/ BPED/MPED and five years of experience OR Renowned National/ International Level players/ Coaches with valid credentials and five years of experience. Consultant Groundsman: Matriculation with three year of experience in maintaining grounds for various Sports activities at School/ College/ University level.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CUJ recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for online registration is 28th June 2026. Candidates must ensure they complete their registration before this date.

faq.question: Q2. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Consultant Sports Instructor/Coach and Consultant Groundsman posts is scheduled for 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What are the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced by the Central University of Jharkhand for these positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the Consultant Groundsman post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Consultant Groundsman post is Matriculation with three years of experience in maintaining grounds.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Consultant Sports Instructor/Coach?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant Sports Instructor/Coach position is 40 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Consultant Sports Instructor/Coach?
faq.answer: The selected Consultant Sports Instructor/Coach will receive a salary of Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for the Consultant Groundsman?
faq.answer: The selected Consultant Groundsman will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry their bio-data, all original documents, self-attested photocopies of documents, and two colour photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Central University of Jharkhand located?
faq.answer: The Central University of Jharkhand is located in Ranchi, Jharkhand, with the pincode 835222.
